profile.name: Sai Sree Harsha Idarapalli
profile.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
profile.summary: Full-stack software engineer with 4+ years of experience building enterprise applications using Java, Spring Boot, React, and AWS. I focus on secure, scalable systems, event-driven architecture, and production-grade delivery with CI/CD automation.

highlights: Developed full-stack enterprise applications with Java, Spring Boot, React, and AWS following enterprise architecture standards.
Designed REST, SOAP, and GraphQL services integrated with Oracle and SQL Server using Hibernate and PL/SQL.
Built event-driven workflows with Apache Kafka and UM queues to support asynchronous microservices.
Improved API throughput by 30% with multithreading, thread pooling, and synchronization.
Reduced deployment failures by 40% through CI/CD automation using Maven, Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Engineered backend services and reusable libraries in Java and Python for scalable microservices platforms.
Built RESTful APIs consumed by React frontends and deployed workloads to Apache Tomcat.
Improved response times by 25% through SQL Server query and schema optimization.
Built distributed AWS backend services supporting high transaction volumes.
Designed asynchronous data-processing flows with Kafka-like messaging systems.
Reduced production incidents by 30% by automating monitoring and alerting.
Developed Java backend applications and internal automation tools.
Created reporting modules that reduced manual processing by 40%.
Handled debugging, functional testing, and production support triage.

projects.name: Event Ticketing Platform
projects.description: Full-stack platform for event discovery, booking, and operational workflows.
projects.impact: Combined Java/Spring services with React and Kafka workflows for resilient transactions.

projects.name: Rental Expense Dashboard
projects.description: Dashboard for expense tracking, visualization, and reporting over SQL-backed data.
projects.impact: Provided clear financial visibility through efficient full-stack architecture.

projects.name: AI Disease Prediction System
projects.description: Python-based data pipeline and model evaluation workflow for health outcome prediction.
projects.impact: Improved experimentation speed with repeatable data preparation and evaluation steps.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science (GPA 3.55)

contact.heading: Let's build reliable software at scale
contact.description: Open to full-stack and backend engineering opportunities where product impact and engineering quality both matter.
